stemHtml: When flying within the NAT HLA, the minimum required means of contacting ATC is by using…

options.a: VHF communications in the 118.000 MHz to 136.975 MHz frequency band.
options.b: HF communications in the 2.8 MHz to 18 MHz frequency band.
options.c: CPDLC using either satellite or HF single sideband.
options.d: Data link through the ACARS or ATN.
